positive: A stylized, geometric illustration featuring a whimsical sloth hanging from lush, tropical vines. The sloth has a minimalist, abstract design with warm terracotta and deep emerald tones. Surroundings include stylized monstera leaves, hibiscus flowers, and delicate jungle foliage, all rendered with clean, bold outlines and negative space elements. The composition should be central, highly symmetric, and suitable for a high-contrast apparel print, utilizing flat design principles and woodcut aesthetics. Studio lighting, vector art style, vibrant, cheerful mood.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, noise, watermark, signature, text, artifacts, ugly, low detail, mutated, extra limbs, bad anatomy, logos, trademarks, copyrighted
